items.title: Top 12 In-ear monitors under $100, $300, $500, and $1000
items.editorNotes: Rewritten for clarity and readability while maintaining factual accuracy.
items.excerptBefore: Discover the top in-ear monitors (IEMs) under $100, $300, $500, and $1000. Whether you're a musician or audiophile, find the best for your budget.
items.excerptAfter: Explore our curated list of the top in-ear monitors (IEMs) across various price points, from under $100 to under $1000, perfect for casual listeners and professionals alike.
items.seoDescriptionBefore: Discover the top in-ear monitors (IEMs! Whether you're a musician or audiophile, find the best for your budget.
items.seoDescriptionAfter: Discover the best in-ear monitors (IEMs) for every budget. From affordable options under $100 to premium picks under $1000, find the perfect sound solution…
items.beforeBody:
Looking for a new pair of in-ear monitors (IEMs) without breaking the bank? We’ve got you covered! Whether you're a casual listener or a budding professional, we’ve compiled the best IEMs at various price points. From affordable options under $100 to premium picks under $1000, this list is designed to help you find the right fit for your needs and budget.

 

In-ear monitors under $100

1. Soundbrenner WAVE

 

If you're looking for the best sound quality under $100, the Soundbrenner WAVE is hard to beat. Known for delivering crisp, studio-quality sound at just $99, these IEMs offer an exceptional price-to-performance ratio. What sets them apart is the level of comfort and customization they offer—with six different ear tips, a 3.5& mm cable, adapter, and travel case included. Whether you're a musician or a music enthusiast, the Soundbrenner WAVE delivers quality and convenience, making it a standout in this price range.

 

Buy now



2. SIMGOT EM6-L

 

While the name may not grab attention, the SIMGOT EM6-L offers excellent value. With a flexible cable and solid build quality, these IEMs deliver a great listening experience for around $100 or less.

 

Buy now



3. KZ ZSN Pro X

 

The KZ ZSN Pro X is known for delivering impressive sound clarity and punchy bass at an affordable price point, typically under $50. It features a hybrid dual driver setup and detachable cables, offering solid build quality and versatility.

 

Buy now



 

In-ear monitors under $300

1. Linsoul 7Hertz Timeless

 

The Linsoul 7HZ Timeless is a 14.2 mm planar HiFi in-ear earphone with a CNC aluminum shell and detachable MMCX cable. Priced around $220, these IEMs feature an ultra-thin diaphragm and lightweight design, offering both comfort and superb sound quality.

 

Buy now



2. Moondrop Starfield

 

At approximately $189, the Moondrop Starfield IEMs offer stunning sound quality with a balanced sound signature. Its aerospace-grade aluminum body and stylish design make it a favorite among audiophiles looking for great performance and aesthetics.

 

Buy now



3. Fiio FH3

 

The Fiio FH3 is priced around $130 and features a hybrid triple driver setup (1 dynamic driver + 2 balanced armatures). Known for its rich sound stage and powerful bass response, the FH3 is perfect for those seeking a more immersive audio experience.

 

Buy now



 

In-ear monitors under $500

1. 64 AUDIO A2E

 

The 64 AUDIO A2E is a top-tier, two-driver custom in-ear monitor designed for emerging artists, bands, or anyone seeking professional sound at an affordable price. At around $499, this IEM is a solid choice for those who need quality on a budget.

 

Buy now



2. Moondrop x Crinacle Dusk IEMs

 

The Moondrop x Crinacle Dusk features a hybrid design (2DD + 2BA) and comes with a 0.78 mm 2-pin connector and multiple plug options. With its balanced sound profile, this is an excellent middle-ground option for those wanting both quality and versatility.

 

Buy now



3. Campfire Audio Polaris II

 

For around $499, the Campfire Audio Polaris II delivers a bold, fun sound signature with deep bass and sparkling highs. Its hybrid driver configuration (1 balanced armature + 1 dynamic driver) and durable build make it a great option for musicians and audiophiles alike.

 

Buy now



 

In-ear monitors under $1000

For those who are serious about their sound or professionals in the industry, these IEMs offer exceptional quality—though they might not be cost-effective for casual listeners.

 

1. Shure SE846G2

 

Priced at $899, the Shure SE846G2 offers dual dynamic drivers and sound-isolating technology, making it a go-to for audiophiles and professionals alike. It also features exceptional noise-canceling, making it perfect for live performances or studio use.

 

Buy now



2. Sennheiser IE 900

 

The Sennheiser IE 900 in-ear headphones, priced around $999, are built with precision-manufactured aluminum housing to protect their advanced TrueResponse transducers. Featuring Sennheiser’s X3R technology, these IEMs provide an unparalleled listening experience, ideal for the most discerning audiophiles.

 

Buy now



3. Campfire Audio Andromeda, 2020

 

At around $999, the Campfire Audio Andromeda 2020 is a flagship model, offering a balanced armature driver configuration with an expansive sound stage. These IEMs are ideal for professionals or audiophiles seeking unmatched clarity and detail in their audio.

 

Buy now



Conclusion

Whether you’re an emerging artist, a dedicated audiophile, or someone looking for a solid pair of IEMs without overspending, these picks cover a wide range of budgets and use cases. From the affordable yet impressive Soundbrenner WAVE, which stands out for its balance of price and performance, to the top-tier Sennheiser IE 900, there’s an IEM for every listener.
